briefdescription.para: MPC events.
MPC interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Error was triggered by an AXI slave.
Error was triggered by MCP module.

briefdescription.para: Error sources.
Permissions mask.

simplesect.para: This enum may be used for both permission settings and permission settings mask.

briefdescription.para: Masterport mask.
Function for retrieving the state of the specified MPC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified MPC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified MPC event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to get the address of.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_mpc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_mpc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_mpc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting configuration of the region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.
Pointer to the structure of the region configuration parameters.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting configuration of the region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.

simplesect.para: Structure with configuration of the region.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting start address of the region.

simplesect.para: Address must be on a 4kB memory boundary.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.
Address to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting start address of the region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.

simplesect.para: Start address of the region.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting address mask of the region.

simplesect.para: Mask must be on a 4kB memory boundary.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.
Address to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting address mask of the region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.

simplesect.para: Address mask of the region.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified master ports of the region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.
Mask of master ports to be enabled, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting enabled master ports of the region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region index.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled master ports, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting configuration of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Pointer to the structure of the override region configuration parameters.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting configuration of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Structure with configuration of the override region.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting start address of the override region.

simplesect.para: Address must be on a 4kB memory boundary.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Address to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting start address of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Start address of the override region.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting end address of the override region.

simplesect.para: Address must be on a 4kB memory boundary.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Address to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting end address of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: End address of the override region.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting offset of the override region.

simplesect.para: Offset will be left shifted before applying, creating a 33-bit signed integer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Address offset value divided by 2.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting offset of the override region.

simplesect.para: Offset is left shifted before applying, creating a 33-bit signed integer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Address offset value divided by 2.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting permission settings for the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Mask of permissions to be set, constructed from nrf_mpc_permission_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting permission settings of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Mask of permissions, constructed from nrf_mpc_permission_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting permission settings mask for the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Mask of permissions settings mask to be set, constructed from nrf_mpc_permission_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting permission settings mask of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Mask of permissions settings mask, constructed from nrf_mpc_permission_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting owner ID for the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Owner ID to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting owner ID of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Owner ID of the overridde region.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified master ports of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.
Mask of master ports to be enabled, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting enabled master ports of the override region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override region index.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled master ports, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the memory address of memory access error.

simplesect.para: Register content will not be changed as long as MEMACCERR event is active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Target address for the errroneous access.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the owner identifier of the transaction that triggered memory access error.

simplesect.para: Register content will not be changed as long as MEMACCERR event is active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Owner identifier of the errorneous access.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the master port of the transaction that triggered memory access error.

simplesect.para: Register content will not be changed as long as MEMACCERR event is active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Master port where errorneous access is detected.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the permissions of the transaction that triggered memory access error.

simplesect.para: Register content will not be changed as long as MEMACCERR event is active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Permission settings of the errorneous access.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the source of the transaction that triggered memory access error.

simplesect.para: Register content will not be changed as long as MEMACCERR event is active.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Source of the errorneous access.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified master ports connection to global slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of master ports to be connected, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting enabled master ports connection to global slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Mask of master ports connected, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the global slave registers lock.

simplesect.para: When global slave registers is enabled, modifying the global slave configuration is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the status of the global slave registers lock.

simplesect.para: When global slave registers is enabled, modifying the global slave configuration is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: True if global slave registers are locked, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the AXI Write Address Channel Real Time Choke for specified master ports.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of master ports to have the Write Real Time Choke enabled, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting master ports with enabled AXI Write Address Channel Real Time Choke.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Mask of master ports with the Write Real Time Choke enabled, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the AXI Read Address Channel Real Time Choke for specified master ports.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of master ports to have the Read Real Time Choke enabled, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting master ports with enabled AXI Read Address Channel Real Time Choke.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Mask of master ports with the Read Real Time Choke enabled, constructed from nrf_mpc_masterport_mask_t enumerator values.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the Real Time Choke delay for the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Slave number.
Delay value to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the Real Time Choke delay for the specified slave.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Slave number.

simplesect.para: Delay value for slave.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether RTCHOKE functionality is present.
Symbol indicating whether SECDOM functionality is present.
Symbol indicating whether configuration of global slave master port connection is present.
Symbol indicating whether configuration of offset for override region is present.
Symbol indicating whether configuration of owner for override region is present.
Symbol indicating whether configuration of master port for override region is present.
Symbol indicating whether configuration of slave for override region is present.
Symbol indicating whether secure bit check for override region indication is present.
Symbol indicating whether privilege level configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether region configuration is present.
Number of regions.
Number of override regions.
Number of master ports.
Number of Real Time Choke slaves.
Hardware access layer for managing the Memory Privilege Controller (MPC) peripheral.
